title: tagetes iltisiana
intro: Tagetes iltisiana, also known as Mexican Marigold, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and relieve digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Tagetes iltisiana can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
